001.description: Pre-dawn dashcam through Knoxville. The road before there is any light — the trip already well underway.
001.now_playing: Prisoner of the Highway — Ronnie Milsap

002.location: I-40 West, Tennessee — foggy river crossing
002.description: Foggy early-morning river crossing. Low clouds sitting heavy on the water. Western Tennessee, pre-dawn.

003.location: I-40 West, Tennessee — foggy river crossing
003.description: The river crossing wide in the morning fog. Tennessee before the sun gets to it.

004.location: Memphis, TN — Bass Pro Shops Pyramid
004.description: The Pyramid on the bank of the Mississippi. Outbound pass.

005.description: The Welcome to Oklahoma highway sign.

006.description: Roland, Oklahoma welcome sign. First state west of the Mississippi.

007.description: A Gillig battery-electric bus on the other side of the charging station — being delivered to ART Arlington Transit (Arlington, VA) by Tarton Chew. Pat's first transit spot of the trip.

008.location: Gray County Safety Rest Area, TX
008.description: Pilot pizza box sitting on the hood. Dinner at the Gray County Safety Rest Area.

009.location: Gray County Safety Rest Area, TX
009.description: Beautiful sunset at Gray County Rest Area. The Texas panhandle sky doing its thing.

010.description: Crepuscular rays through the clouds at dusk. Texas Panhandle sky delivering.

011.location: I-40 West, New Mexico — approaching Albuquerque
011.description: Straight desert road through New Mexico. Long empty miles approaching Albuquerque.

012.location: I-40 West, New Mexico — west of Albuquerque
012.description: Dashcam through pale desert dusk west of Albuquerque.

013.description: Dashcam catches an unidentified antique car driving the shoulder at maybe 25–30 mph. Arizona night, I-40 near Winslow.

014.location: Meteor Crater Rest Area, AZ — I-40 West
014.description: Desert rock formations at sunset. Serenity visible in the lot.

015.location: Meteor Crater Rest Area, AZ — I-40 West
015.description: Rainbow arcing over the red rock formations after sunset.

016.location: Meteor Crater Rest Area, AZ — I-40 West
016.description: Panorama: sunset burning on the left, the rainbow still showing on the right. Two Guns Rest Area at dusk.

017.location: Meteor Crater Rest Area, AZ — I-40 West
017.description: Poisonous snakes and insects warning sign at the rest area.

018.location: Meteor Crater Rest Area, AZ — I-40 West
018.description: Serenity sitting still in the orange dusk light. Arizona canyon country at its best.

019.description: Dashcam catches an eastbound Gillig Low Floor bus in delivery — agency unknown. Arizona, heading toward Kingman.
019.now_playing: Sweet Talkin' Woman — Electric Light Orchestra

020.description: In-N-Out sign spotted from the highway in Kingman.

021.description: Serenity with that wall of snow-capped Sierra Nevada peaks filling the windshield. The view you drive 2,000 miles to see — and it's still bigger than expected.

022.description: A truck across the parking lot at a truck stop. Two small dogs in the window looking out at the dark.

023.description: Serenity at the rest stop at sunset. Mountains taking the last color. The quiet out here is something.

024.description: Serenity at full crimson-orange sunset. The Nevada sky doing what it does.

025.location: Millers Rest Area, NV — near Tonopah
025.description: A kangaroo rat at Millers Rest Area. The desert still very much alive at 4am.

026.description: Clouds and open sky at Millers Rest Area. Stars where the clouds break. No trees, no branches — just sky.

027.location: Millers Rest Area, NV — near Tonopah
027.description: Brief time lapse of the night sky. The Milky Way overhead, Millers Rest Area at 4am.

028.location: US-6, Montgomery Pass area — CA/NV border
028.description: Road aimed south through the high desert toward the Sierra Nevada. The range coming into view, white-capped against the sky.

029.location: US-395, Owens Valley, CA — north of Bishop
029.description: A white water tank in the sagebrush with the Sierra Nevada behind it. The tank reads "WE MISS YOU ALREADY."

030.description: A Victor Valley Transit bus spotted on a frontage road from the highway near Barstow.

031.description: A Gillig Low Floor battery-electric bus in delivery to Atomic City Transit (Los Alamos, NM). Caught on dashcam near Ludlow.

032.description: Gas pump in California. The prices out here.

033.description: Area 66 — the geodesic dome visible from I-40 in Yucca, Arizona. Originally a sales office for a fraudulent land development scheme; now a UFO museum on Route 66.

034.location: I-40 East, Arizona — Mohave County, near Yucca
034.description: Dashcam eastbound on I-40 through western Arizona near Yucca. Heading back.

035.description: Rock formations along I-40 eastbound through western Arizona. Arizona canyon country.

036.description: Dashcam through Arizona heading east near Kingman.

037.location: US-89, near Cameron, AZ — heading toward Monument Valley
037.description: Empty two-lane road running straight into the red desert. US-89 north of Flagstaff, Monument Valley still hours ahead.

038.location: US-163, Kayenta, AZ — approaching Monument Valley
038.description: A single red butte on the horizon. The valley announcing itself from Kayenta.

039.location: Monument Valley Navajo Tribal Park, AZ
039.description: Multiple sandstone buttes. The classic formation, better than any photograph suggests.

040.location: Monument Valley Navajo Tribal Park, AZ
040.description: Tall spire of sandstone against the sky. The formations up close.

041.description: The road through the valley with buttes on either side. The shot everyone takes. Still earned.

042.location: East & West Mitten Buttes, Monument Valley
042.description: The Mittens — East Mitten and West Mitten Buttes from US-163. The most photographed view in Monument Valley. Nothing prepares you for the scale.

043.location: US-163 heading north, San Juan County, UT
043.description: Road bending into a red canyon. Sandstone walls closing in. Just past Monument Valley heading north toward Mexican Hat.

044.location: US-163, Utah — north of Mexican Hat
044.description: Dashcam heading north through Utah on US-163, Monument Valley behind.
044.now_playing: Riders In The Sky — The Sons of the Pioneers

045.description: Winding red-rock canyon road. Rust and shadow. San Juan County, Utah.

046.description: Straight desert road with a flat-topped mesa ahead. The road home starting.

047.description: Highway with mesa in the frame. San Juan County, Utah — leaving Monument Valley country.

048.location: Tinker AFB, Midwest City, OK — Major Charles B. Hall Airpark
048.description: Static display aircraft at Tinker AFB's Major Charles B. Hall Airpark, spotted from I-40. The C-135 Stratolifter in the mix — 707 family, same bloodline as Air Force One.

049.description: Forrest City Rest Area on I-40, Arkansas. Stopped here on the way out too — no photo then. This is the return leg. Same parking lot, facing east.

050.location: Memphis, TN — I-40 Mississippi River bridge
050.description: I-40 bridge over the Mississippi. Memphis return crossing.

051.description: "Welcome to Tennessee" banner framed by bridge trusses — composed like one of those old vacation postcards.

052.location: Memphis, TN — Bass Pro Shops Pyramid
052.description: The Pyramid from the bridge, return pass. Same building, different angle — you've crossed the Mississippi twice now.

053.description: Buc-ee's in Crossville, Tennessee. The traditional stop before the mountains start.

054.location: I-81, northeastern Tennessee — final drive home
054.description: A brief video of the "Welcome to Virginia" sign. Almost home.
